name: wp-plugin-health
description: CLI health checker for WordPress plugins — 15 quality signals, 0-100 score

scripts.test: node index.js akismet && node index.js --json akismet | node -e "const d = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); process.exit(d.score > 0 ? 0 : 1)" && echo 'Tests passed'

author: NickCirv
